betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Have you made too many mistakes and researched yourself into a corner by getting too much warp with no way to get rid of it? Do you wish you could just start everything over? The [warn]Potion of Blissful Oblivion[/warn] is the solution you are looking for.

At the cost of your knowledge of [warn]all research, all discovered aspects, all knowledge points in the Research Table, and everything scanned with a Thaumometer[/warn], all of your warp will be removed. It won't do anything about warp from armor, so you might still get minor warp events if you're wearing any warpy armor. Be absolutely certain you know what you are doing before you drink this.

Keep in mind that there are better alternatives for dealing with warp (which you can see in the Adept Thaumaturgy tab). This is just the cheapest one.

[note]It's also a rather decent source of Strontio.[/note]
